zh.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre於大約1260年出生在比利時納姆爾。她於1270年與Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland在荷蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1296年3月23日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯豪-德-科利尼享年37歲，埋葬在荷蘭-拉藍德利斯包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre于大约1260年出生在比利时納姆爾。她于1270年与Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland在荷兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1296年3月23日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯豪-德-科利尼享年37岁，埋葬在荷兰-拉藍德利斯包格。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre was born about 1260, in Namur, Belgium. She married Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland in 1270, in Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 23 March 1296, in Châtillon, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 37, and was buried in Rijnsburg, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre est née environ 1260, à Namur, Belgique. Elle a épousé Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland en 1270, à Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 mars 1296, à Châtillon, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Rijnsburg, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre wurde um 1260 in Namen, Belgien geboren. Sie hat 1270 in Niederlande Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. März 1296 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Châtillon, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Rijnsburg, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre è nata il circa 1260 nel Namur, Belgio. Lei sposato Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland nel 1270, nel Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 marzo 1296, nel Châtillon, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Rijnsburg, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandreは約1260年にベルギーナムルで生まれた。1270年にオランダでFloris V Graaf van Holland en Zeelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1296年3月23日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスハウトス-デ-セアインチaティロンで37歳で死去し，オランダズイド-hオランドリジンスブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre(은)는 대략 1260년 벨기에 남어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1270년 네덜란드에서 Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1296년 3월 23일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 하츠-데-세이인 cha틸런에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 리제이스버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Namur, Bélgica. Ela casou-se com Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland em 1270, em Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de março de 1296, em Châtillon, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, França, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Rijnsburg, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre родилась около 1260 г. в местности намур, Бельгия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland в 1270 г. в местности Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 23 марта 1296 г. в местности чaтиллон, хауц-де-син, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности риджнсбург, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre nació aproximadamente 1260, en Namur, Bélgica. Se casó con Floris V Graaf van Holland en Zeeland en 1270, en Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1296, en Châtillon, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Rijnsburg, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
